subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The fragrance of thy love hath been wafted to the sanctuary of oneness, and thy intention hath drawn nigh unto the precincts of the Desired One, in the presence of the Lord of the Unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نفحه حبت بمکمن احدیت حاضر و اراده ات بکوی مقصود نزد مالک غیب و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @presence of; reunion with God
